title: Hooks matcher format invalid - object instead of string
error: hooks.PostToolUse.0.matcher: Expected string, but received object
cause: The hooks matcher field in settings.json uses an object format {"tools": [...]} instead of the required string format with pipe separators. Claude Code hooks now require matcher to be a string.
solution: Replace object matcher {"tools": ["Edit", "Write", "Bash"]} with string format: "Edit|Write|Bash"
migration_notes: Join array of tool names with pipe separator. Example: {"tools": ["Edit", "Write"]} becomes "Edit|Write"
